name: United States Government (USTR)
description: US trade policy authority with Section 232 national security tariff authority. Balances domestic steel lobby demands with strategic partnership considerations.
objectives: Protect domestic steel production capacity from import surge
Maintain national security justification for Section 232 tariffs
Preserve strategic partnership with India while enforcing trade remedies
Achieve bilateral trade balance improvement through tariff leverage
constraints: Section 232 actions subject to judicial review and WTO dispute challenge
Congress oversight limits unilateral tariff escalation beyond current levels
Strategic priorities in Indo-Pacific require careful India relationship management
Domestic consumer industries oppose tariffs due to input cost increases
